title: Hand-rolled JSON extractor in SecretValue::extract_field is justified
description: SecretValue::extract_field uses a hand-rolled JSON scanner (core lib:48-135) instead of serde_json. A contributor will reasonably suggest replacing this with serde_json::from_str. Reason to resist: serde_json's Value::Object allocates and stores copies of ALL field values in heap memory that is not zeroized on drop. A secret bundle like {"password":"x","api_key":"y"} would leave both values in unzeroized heap even if you only asked for 'password'. The hand-rolled scanner allocates only the value of the requested field, matching the zeroize guarantee of SecretValue. This is the right design and should be defended.
